title: Studies on Control of the Problem Weed Amischophacehis axillaris (Linn.) R. Rao et Kamm.
abstract:
Amischophacelus axillaris is a common problem weed of Kharif in this
area and has been reported from Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra and Uttar Pradesh
(Joshi 1974). The general practice is the hand removal. As the chemical control
has been reported (Dubey and Mall 1972, Lall and Choudhary 1974, Amritphale
1976) for many weeds with vegetative propagation an attempt for the chemical
control of this weed has been made....
